---
title: "Data transformation with dplyr"
code-line-numbers: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/dplyr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/dplyr.html){target="_blank"} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="slides_pdf/dplyr.pdf" download>Download PDF slides</a>

# Task

Go to the [task page](tasks/dplyr.qmd) for the exercises.

## Further reading

- [dplyr cheatsheet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/cheatsheets/master/data-transformation.pdf)
